title: Solana SISO Testbed: HP3C 2026 Paper-Facing Artifact for Bottleneck Onset and Saturation Analysis
description: Public artifact for HP3C 2026 supporting paper-facing analysis in a private Solana blockchain testbed. The archive captures synthetic-load experiments, the canonical paper-facing dataset path raw_selected -> processed -> results -> figures, and reproducibility-oriented materials for bottleneck onset and saturation behavior analysis.
